title: ジャパンCの後に・得たもの

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon is defeated by Tokai Teio at the
Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, as she is enveloped by the cheers of the
crowd, she's happy to find that she was able to
inspire others.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio praises her, saying that Mihono
Bourbon ran so well against her that she still feels
frustrated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them promise to have a rematch
someday.
